headline: Estée Lauder Legal Challenges Test Valuation And Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Estée Lauder Companies (NYSE:EL) has agreed to a $210 million all-cash settlement of a shareholder lawsuit tied to alleged reliance on grey market "daigou" sales in China. The company is also in an active legal dispute with Zara over alleged trademark infringement involving Jo Malone branded fragrances. These legal developments sit alongside recent attention on earnings, restructuring, and valuation, adding a fresh legal and governance angle for investors to assess. For investors tracking...
